title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A YouTube video reviewing major AI releases in a single week, including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, Qwen 3.6, HY3, and Vision Banana. The channel characterizes this week as exceptional and "insane" in the pace and volume of AI announcements.
